name: comchin
description: 컴친(컴퓨터 친구) — PC 견적/쇼핑 웹앱 (모노레포: frontend + backend)

scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend ci --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix backend run db:push && npm --prefix backend run db:import
